calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Zhira Lala Mohsen was present in pro per on behalf of herself, and as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Cannan Murad Mohsen.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file. Written consent of the minor's father, Murad Mohsen, for the proposed name change was submitted to the Court today, November 17, 2009.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Zahira Lala Salma.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Canaan Sylas Salma.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
